message:
feat(doctor_frankentui): add OpenTUI import pipeline and semantic contract infrastructure

Import subcommand (src/import.rs):
- Materialize deterministic source snapshots from local paths or git URLs
  via git archive | tar for immutable intake
- Validate OpenTUI project shape (requires package.json unless
  --allow-non-opentui) and compute SHA-256 lockfile fingerprints
- Detect rich toolchain fingerprint: package manager + version, Node/TS
  versions, JSX mode, tsconfig strict flags, bundler, workspace markers,
  Rust toolchain, dynamic import detection
- Compute recursive SHA-256 directory hash and write intake_meta.json
- Classify errors into typed IntakeErrorClass codes (auth, network,
  missing_files, incompatible_repo, unknown) with numeric exit codes 41-45
- Emit structured JSON result for integration mode

Semantic contract infrastructure (src/semantic_contract.rs, contracts/):
- SemanticEquivalenceContract: validates normative equivalence for
  OpenTUI->FrankenTUI migrations with clause lookups and validator mapping
- TransformationPolicyMatrix: validates policy cells sorted by construct
  signature, all semantic_clause_links reference valid clauses, 6 required
  categories covered, planner/certification projections non-empty
- EvidenceManifest: hash chain invariant between pipeline stages
- ConfidenceModel: version-validated parsed contract
- All 4 contracts compiled in via include_str! from JSON files in
  contracts/ directory

Spec documents (docs/spec/):
- opentui-semantic-equivalence-contract.md
- opentui-evidence-manifest.md
- opentui-transformation-policy-matrix.md (referenced but not new)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
